properties.description: Locks the Flashing Light, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Flashing Light on, when set to 1. Turns the Flashing light off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Flashing Light is receiving power and is turned on. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the currently required power of the Flashing Light, in Watts.
